2195040.name: Beneath the Graves
2195040.description: Experience hair raising thrills as you try to avoid the boss monster and make your way to the exit. True it may be a labyrinth, but the spirits will guide you to the exit to escape this nightmare. With traps and monsters lurking around, you will have to be cautious as the quickest route may not always be the safest route. In all likelihood beneath the graves will be your final resting place. Can you beat the odds and escape?
2195040.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
